_comment: Drives the npx installer. Each entry copies a source dir from the repo (at the pinned ref) into the consuming repo. 'kind' selects the per-agent emitter (skill|kit|rule|agent). 'to' is the Claude destination; other agents' destinations are derived from kind. 'wire: true' = one-time manual setup needed (the installer prints a note, never auto-merges build config).

shared.wire: Merge justfile.snippet into your root justfile and set the *_dir variables to your layout — this is the ONE place paths live. It defines `just check` + per-tech recipes (rust-lint/rust-check, ts-*, go-*) that both the git hooks and the agent call. autonomy.md auto-loads from .claude/rules/agent/ (no wiring). (`claude-rules init` can assemble this for you.)

rust.wire: Merge lefthook.snippet.yml into lefthook.yml (thin triggers → `just rust-lint`/`rust-check`) and set `rust_dir` in the justfile. Move deny.toml→<rust_dir>, mutants.toml→<rust_dir>/.cargo/, mutation-ci.yaml→.gitea/workflows/. rust-fmt.sh is a SPECIAL CASE (generated member crate): swap the fmt command in rust-check + add #![allow(clippy::all)] to that crate. See .claude/kit/README.md.

ts._note: TS language baseline: quality-gate rules + the kit gates. React frontend architecture lives in the `portal-flat` profile; a Node/TS backend adds `api` + `backend`.
ts.wire: Merge lefthook.snippet.yml into lefthook.yml (thin triggers → `just ts-lint`/`ts-check`) and set `ts_dir` in the justfile. Adapt eslint.config.base.js globalIgnores into your eslint config.

go.wire: Merge lefthook.snippet.yml into lefthook.yml (thin triggers → `just go-lint`/`go-check`) and set `go_dir` in the justfile. Move golangci.base.yml→<go_dir>/.golangci.yml.

godot._note: Godot 4 + C# (strong typing) game profile — gate: gamedev. Co-location by entity, composition over inheritance, single typed EventBus, all gameplay data in .tres (zero hardcoded values), legacy .gd migration policy (no new .gd). Path-scoped **/*.cs (+ .tscn/.tres/.gd where relevant).

godot.wire: Merge lefthook.snippet.yml into lefthook.yml (thin triggers → `just godot-lint`/`godot-check`) and justfile.snippet into the justfile; set godot_dir/godot_bin/godot_export_preset. chmod +x check-no-new-gd.sh. Godot project needs C# (.NET) + export templates + GDUnit4 + a matching export preset. Ships Roslyn analyzers (GODOT001 hardcoded values, GODOT002 signal placement, GODOT003 string node paths) that run inside dotnet build — reference the analyzer .csproj from the game project. The headless-export gate catches broken .tscn/.tres refs the C# compiler can't. See kit/godot/README.md.

hexagonal._note: Architecture pattern — gate: backend/fullstack. Ships the agnostic principle + language idioms (rust/go), path-scoped so only your language's loads. `rust-add-domain` is the rust DI-container transformation skill (needs rust-di-container.md). `architect` recommends this for backend/fullstack shapes.

cqrs._note: Architecture pattern — gate: EXPLICIT opt-in only (non-standard). The rust variant assumes the home library `cqrs-rust-lib` (github.com/dohrm/cqrs-rust-lib). Add explicitly: `add cqrs`.

portal-flat._note: React framework quality gates (Rules of Hooks, purity, RTL, a11y) — decoupled from the flat-domain architecture, applies to any React app.

Frontend architecture — gate: frontend. Flat-domain modular React portal: agnostic principle + React idioms (OpenAPI-generated client, TanStack Query, contexts). Leptos support was dropped. Pairs with `ts` (language baseline).

portal-flat.wire: Copy openapi-ts.config.ts to your frontend root. Install: `npm i -D @hey-api/openapi-ts` + `npm i @hey-api/client-axios @tanstack/react-query zod`. Add package.json scripts `generate:api` ("openapi-ts", live backend) and `generate:api:file` (same, CI sets OPENAPI_SPEC to the spec artifact). Create src/config/hey-api.ts exporting the client runtimeConfig (base URL + auth interceptor). Ensure eslint globalIgnores and tsconfig exclude src/api/generated. NOT a hook tier — codegen is a dev/CI step, not a gate.

api._note: Opinionated HTTP-API stack — gate: backend/fullstack. rust=axum+utoipa, go=chi+Huma, node=Fastify. All emit OpenAPI (the contract `portal-flat` generates its client from). Path-scoped per language; add explicitly: `add api`.

backend._note: Cross-language backend conventions — gate: backend/fullstack. Error contract (problem+json), config & secrets, health & lifecycle, pagination. Language-agnostic; add explicitly: `add backend`.

investigate._note: Opt-in, language-agnostic skill — a 4-phase debug methodology (locate → hypothesize → instrument → fix), model-independent. Add explicitly: `add investigate`.

loop-setup._note: Opt-in, language- and host-agnostic skill — frames a self-terminating agent loop (4 preconditions → bounded objective → measurable done-command → budget/iteration guardrails) and writes PLAN.md + MEMORY.md + the loop prompt. Handoff branches per host: Claude /loop, Codex /goal, Cursor automation. Named loop-setup to avoid collision with Claude's built-in /loop. Add explicitly: `add loop-setup`.

product._note: Opt-in product-lifecycle skills. Chain: interview → prd (what) → architect (how/ADRs) + design-system (visual) → plan (phases); diagram supports throughout. Adapted from claude-mastery + `architect` added here. Dependency-free, brand-neutral. Git-flow commands (branche/livre) intentionally dropped. Add explicitly: `add product`.
